faqs.answer:
Bengal College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate having passed Diploma in Engineering/ Technology from a recognised board or must have completed B.Sc. in Maths from a recognised university are also eligible.

placements.overview:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Bengal College of Engineering admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

Established in 2001, Bengal College of Engineering is a private institute in Durgapur, West Bengal. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG levels, the institute offers 4 courses across 3 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Bengal College of Engineering program include B.E. / B.Tech. Bengal College of Engineering course is provided in stream including Engineering. The institute has a total seat intake of 150 students. The fees at Bengal College of Engineering ranges between INR 2,95,000 to 3,70,300 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

At the UG level, Bengal College of Engineering offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Engineering. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. The Bengal College of Engineering course fee ranges between INR 2,95,000 to 3,70,300.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG level, Bengal College of Engineering offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Engineering. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. The Bengal College of Engineering course fee ranges between INR 2,95,000 to 3,70,300.

faqs.answer: A:    Bengal College of Engineering has courses such as B.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Engineering. Bengal College of Engineering has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Bengal College of Engineering are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Bengal College of Engineering goes up to 150.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with our college for the culture, and there are many restrictions here.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered ranges between 4-5 LPA. Companies like Cipla, Mankind, Sun Pharma, Scindia, and Glenmark visit our college for placements. In the previous year, the highest salary package offered in our course was 8 LPA by Cipla.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities. Book bank facility is available, and six library cards for each student are provided. The library is open for 11 hours Monday to Saturday for students. Classrooms are good, and fans are not making noise. Earlier, the college provided Wi-Fi. Now college does not provide Wi-Fi. The food served in a mess is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend joining this college if you want the CSE branch.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. About 70% of the students from our course get internships. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Accenture, Extramark, Byju's, etc., visit our college for placements. In the previous year, the highest salary package offered in our college was 12 LPA by Byju's.
review_content.Infrastructure: BCE buildings are well-furnished and the library section is also very good. The lights are very good at our college. Book bank facilities are available and three library cards to each faculty are provided by the university. The library is open for 11 hours daily and on Sundays too.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It's pretty much good if you talk about a cheap college. But I would not recommend it for any one.

review_content.Placements: Placements are quite average. On an average 3-4 lacs package. Mostly more than half of the strength of batch gets a placement but it cannot be considered as a good point. So try to avoid this college. The highest package goes to 12 lacs and the lowest 1-3 lacs. College will arrange for the internship programs in the final year. Top recruitment companies are -wipro infotech etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Course is the same as MAKAUT mentioned. Hostel is separate for 1st year. Anti ragging campus. Small playground. Cricket tournament and football tournaments are carried out on another campus. Events used to held before corona but once closed it's still closed. Hostel has medical facilities, canteen is not good. Library is small but you'll get books you want. Infrastructure is 7/10.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college infrastructure is really very good, and the placements are average.

review_content.Placements: I was from the CSE department and passed out in 2020. Our college placements are very good. Almost 45% of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered till now is around 9 LPA, the lowest package is around 1.2 LPA, and the average package is around 5 LPA. Many reputed companies like TCS, Mahindra and sales companies like BYJU's, Extramarks, etc., recruit students from our college. There is no internship offered in our college. If you want to do an internship, you will have to apply for it outside. Roles offered were mainly of software engineers, assistant engineers etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a below-average college. I suggest you not to take admission here if you are from West Bengal.

review_content.Placements: There is only CSE branch here. If you join this college in other branches, then you get transferred to BCET, which is the branch of this same college. There is a placement cell for both BCE and BCET. Every company visits here to offer only marketing roles but not for SDE roles. The highest salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA-5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Byju's offered the salary package of 10 LPA in the previous year, which is offered to one student. Almost 50% of the students got placed. Overall, placements are below average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It's good if you want to pursue engineering but better options are still available.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80 percent of the students are placed in our college. Only service based companies come to our college like byjus. If you want to go in marketing sector then this is good choice for you. Patanjali also came and many other different companies come to our college. Our college do not provide internship to students and top roles offered in course are software developer and in marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Coming to infrastructure, it's good but hostel is not very worthy to live in. I would highly recommend girls to live in PG rather than hostel because of food and behaviour of hostel management. We have library where books are available from 10 am to 5 pm. We do have different infrastructure for various departments.

overview_faqs.answer: Bengal College of Engineering is a reputed institute for B.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering. The library is open for 11 hours Monday to Saturday for students. Classrooms are good, and fans are not making noise. Earlier, the college provided Wi-Fi. Now college does not provide Wi-Fi. reviews.review_text: BCE buildings are well-furnished and the library section is also very good. The lights are very good at our college. reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is really very good, and the placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel facilities are quite good. There is a Wi-Fi network everywhere on the campus, as well as in the hostel. There is a library, and books for all streams are easily available. There is a sports ground, and also medical facilities. The food quality in the hostel is average. We have a very good canteen and mess where hygienic food is served. We have good transportation facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a below-average college. I suggest you not to take admission here if you are from West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here, but I suggest you not to expect that it is the top campus. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is also good, and you get two PCs with internet facility in the library. The hostel stay is awesome, but the quality of the food served is very bad. The hostel serves only vegetarian food, but it is not value for money, so you have to depend on Zomato. Due to bad water, about 50% of the students of our batch are affected with jaundice, including me also. The hoste...

reviews.review_heading: It's good if you want to pursue engineering but better options are still available.
reviews.review_text: Coming to infrastructure, it's good but hostel is not very worthy to live in. I would highly recommend girls to live in PG rather than hostel because of food and behaviour of hostel management. We have library where books are available from 10 am to 5 pm. We do have different infrastructure for various departments.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good. They support the students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Hostel facilities are good, canteen, medical facilities all are there in this college. Wi-Fi is there in our college. Library contains many useful books, we have separate reading room which contain newspaper, and articles too. Quality of food is good but nut so much.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college to do engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was very basic, and the Wi-Fi on the campus was not working. Labs were not good. We had good classrooms, and the library was quite a good place in our college. Facilities provided in the hostel were better than other places. The quality of the food served was also awesome.

reviews.review_heading: The best private college in Durgapur, West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice. I can't say that it's too good, but it's okay. As our college has three wings with the same administration, we can say in short that our infrastructure is good enough as our college is just turned now from women's college to co-education.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is large and well-equipped labs are available, but no Wi-Fi. Medical facilities are available 24x7, sports like basketball and badminton courts are there. The college has a big ground. There is a canteen and moms kitchen. The quality of the food is average. The hostel rooms are good. There are no such issues with the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and all the labs are well furnished and well-equipped with the requirements. Books are also being issued from the library without any charge for the whole semester. Medical facilities are available at one call. Wi-Fi is the recent facility added to our whole campus for free. The canteen is not so good because non-veg is not allowed on the campus, and I think that students can't live without chicken. The hostel is good as the warden is very concerned about all the students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of worst faculty and their teaching methods and worse placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has got good infrastructure. The labs are air-conditioned, there is internet lab for students as well. Medical facilities are good. Annual sports meet is organized, and several inter-college gaming competitions are also held for the overall development of the students. The canteen food is worse. The hostel rooms are good. And the overall infrastructure of the college is pretty good according to me. The library is pretty good but doesn't have versatility in books of different authors.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the placement and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was not as expected from an engineering college. The classes allotted were still in construction. There was no Wi-Fi facility in the college. The library didn't have enough books for the total number of students. There was no medical facility in the college. No sports and games were conducted.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but many things are still to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good but can be made better. The infrastructure is fine but the labs need to be updated. Some of the labs' machines don't work properly. We have to perform the experiment in a group of 5-6 or more. As for the hostel, the food provided in the mess is pure vegetarian and the quality and menu is not so good, which costs a little more for the mess charges per semester. Otherwise, the hostel's rooms and washrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in Durgapur as compared to others with all the proper facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good library with all sort of books related to academic and every aspect of books. Old as well as new edition books are available. Fully centralized AC and Wi-Fi is being provided in the library. The labs are fully equipped and all the equipment are well-maintained. The classrooms are in a good condition as well as are having proper light and fan facilities. Medical facility is also present as the college is linked with the nearby hospital. Games are organized regularly. The ca...

faqs.question: Which are the top 10 Engineering job profiles?
faqs.answer:
Engineering job profiles vary across the industry as well as the domain where the person is recruited. Since the popular industries include petrochemicals, civil engineering, construction and other allied industries, the following job profiles are very popular and offer promising career opportunities
Job Profile Average Annual Income (INR)
Software Engineer 4-8 LPA
Civil Engineer 3-6 LPA
Petroleum Engineer 5-8 LPA
Mining Engineer 4-7 LPA
Mechanical Engineer 3-6 LPA
Aeronautical Engineer 4-7 LPA
Metallurgical Engineer 4-6 LPA
Electrical Engineer 3-6 LPA
Electronics Engineer 3-6 LPA
Chemical Engineer 4-6 LPA
Note- The salary is taken from external sites and may vary.
More about -
Engineering Career

faqs.question: Are there any specializations available in Dairy Technology?
faqs.answer:
Yes, there are. 
Dairy Chemistry
Dairy Microbiology
Dairy Processing
Dairy Management
These specializations allow you to study deeper into your areas of interest within the broader field of Dairy Technology.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for studies but not in terms of placements.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.8 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our college were Amarai, Milky Mist, Milma, etc. Roles offered were technical superintendent, quality analyst, etc. About 10% of the students got internships, and internships are mandatory here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure, and there were almost all labs like microbiology, computer lab, chemistry and technology labs. Classrooms were neat and clean. One of the main attractive things in our college is its good library, which has books that help students to learn better. There were separate hostels for both boys and girls, and the food available at the hostel has good quality. The college also gives importance to sports.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and faculties also have good campus life

review_content.Infrastructure: Good ..have well finished labs in each departments..and got accredition from aicte Hostel mess is providing good quality food Hostel and college has Wi Fi facilities, College has smart classrooms ,library facilities too. Sports, games activities are highly appreciating

review_summary.college_name: College of Dairy Science and Technology, Mannuthy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 0
individual_reviews.title: College has a good infrastructure, but I am slightly dissatisfied with the placements.

content.Placements: Placement cell is very less active in our college. Only 10% of the total batch got placed. The top company visiting for placements was Amul. They only offered the roles in sales and marketing department. All the students got internships in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are smart having Wi-Fi connections in both college and the hostel. Labs have good facilities with highly sophisticated equipments. Food available in the mess and the canteen is of good quality. Gym, sports and games are highly appreciated. Multiple clinics are located nearby.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for studies but not in terms of placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.8 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our college were Amarai, Milky Mist, Milma, etc. Roles offered were technical superintendent, quality analyst, etc. About 10% of the students got internships, and internships are mandatory here.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure, and there were almost all labs like microbiology, computer lab, chemistry and technology labs. Classrooms were neat and clean. One of the main attractive things in our college is its good library, which has books that help students to learn better. There were separate hostels for both boys and girls, and the food available at the hostel has good quality. The college also gives importance to sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and faculties also have good campus life

content.Placements: Placement cell is not that much active now. But many students get opportunities in different fields after finishing course. Dairy technologist, quality trainees are the most offered roles from milma, Amrutha dairy.,elanadu milks,sapiens dairy etc
content.Infrastructure: Good ..have well finished labs in each departments..and got accredition from aicte Hostel mess is providing good quality food Hostel and college has Wi Fi facilities, College has smart classrooms ,library facilities too. Sports, games activities are highly appreciating

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It had good placements in the previous years.

content.Placements: For 2021 passout students, placements were very low compared to 2020 and 2019 passout students. The average salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. After the completion of the course, the main job roles include technical superintendent and quality control officer in any dairy. You can write PSC examination for the post of dairy extension officer.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is new, and the labs are equipped with all the necessary instruments to help you with the practicals. The college also has a good library, where you can find essential books. The hostel building is old and has its limitations. Wi-Fi is provided in the hostel. The food quality in the mess is also good. Sports and games are conducted every year. Games include volleyball, football, and badminton.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Very good infrastructure and staff.

review_content.Placements: Overall, around 60 percent of the students across all the departments got placed in the core companies. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Airtel, Nextgen solution, and Yamaha. The placement cell also offered a comprehensive training which was helpful.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and the library were well designed. Laboratory was available for all the departments. Wi-Fi was available in the library space. The hostel and canteen are good. Food was provided properly. The canteen has breakfast and lunch available at an affordable cost.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good and enjoyable.

review_content.Placements: Almost 65% of the students got placed in core companies, but remaining students are trying for some other department jobs. However, 100% of the students got selected in the campus interviews. Top recruiting companies of our college are Infosys and Wipro. Almost 60% of the students got an internship. We are happy to write C languages code.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms and library create good vibes and good infrastructure. Hostels are good, but the disadvantage is there is no non-vegetarian. Correct time food and snacks are distributed in properly. Not only students but the principal also eat hostel food only.

faqs.answer: Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MCACandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

overview_faqs.question: Is Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology are B.Tech, MCA, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 4.1 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.3, 4 and 4 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: There was a separate placement department to monitor all the placement processes. As they arrange placement drives, students from other colleges were also asked to attend those drives. The highest salary package offered by recruiters will be 7LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Its a famous college in Cuddalore District. Students from various districts join our college to do their higher studies. The foods available at our canteen were acceptable to eat. The laboratories were maintained with a limited number of systems and machines.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the good infrastructure, facilities, and placements.

content.Placements: In our batch, above 60% of the students get placed with a salary package of above 4.5 LPA. All the courses have affordable fees compared to other colleges in Cuddalore. The greatest corporate "Infosys" took around 10 students on internship. CSE, ECE, EEE, civil, mechanical, and also PG courses are the top courses offered.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, but labs are advanced. In Cuddalore and around Cuddalore only our college has a huge big library with more than 7,000 books. I am satisfied with the good infrastructure and facilities, and placements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and staff.

content.Placements: Overall, around 60 percent of the students across all the departments got placed in the core companies. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Airtel, Nextgen solution, and Yamaha. The placement cell also offered a comprehensive training which was helpful.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and the library were well designed. Laboratory was available for all the departments. Wi-Fi was available in the library space. The hostel and canteen are good. Food was provided properly. The canteen has breakfast and lunch available at an affordable cost.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good and enjoyable.

content.Placements: Almost 65% of the students got placed in core companies, but remaining students are trying for some other department jobs. However, 100% of the students got selected in the campus interviews. Top recruiting companies of our college are Infosys and Wipro. Almost 60% of the students got an internship. We are happy to write C languages code.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms and library create good vibes and good infrastructure. Hostels are good, but the disadvantage is there is no non-vegetarian. Correct time food and snacks are distributed in properly. Not only students but the principal also eat hostel food only.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Our college provided internships, workshops, and so on. Students attended the campus interview and got their jobs.
content.Infrastructure: It was the biggest college. It offered many facilities like more than 40 classrooms, computer lab, physics lab, chemistry lab, sports room, drinking water, and library. The canteen is one of the best places in our college. Sports equipment is available in the sports room.
content.Faculty: We had well-qualified, helpful, and professional teachers. They clarified our doubts. There were 3 exams. It was easy to pass all the subjects. There were 3 internal exams. They prepared us for the final examination. The pass percentage was 45%.

faqs.question: How can I get into Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Krishnasamy College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are a

reviews.review_heading: A well furnished infrastructure with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It was absolutely mentioned in the brochure that its campus has fully accessible Wi-Fi, but I did not experience it at all. No doubt the campus is really great for a study environment, the Library, computer labs, and departmental infrastructure are really well structured. It looks great from inside instead of Outlook. There were a bit of sports activities, like I loved playing football there.

reviews.review_heading: We can join the college, the entry and exit are flexible for everyone. Teachers are also good.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel in my college. They do not share the Wi-Fi password with students. Library is good enough to learn and study. The canteen is not big so in the interval, the canteen does not have space for the students to even sit.

reviews.review_heading: Don't do MBA from this college.
reviews.review_text: College has the facility of library and computer lab, the rest of classroom is not special. The campus of the college is also small. College has canteen in the campus. The quality of foods is not that good, and the curricular activities are also not there. Sometimes there are sports competition's .

review_content.General: Old campus with new building for mechanical engineering and civil engineering streams. Campus place is good for education students get motivation to study well. Hostel is good with and proper maintenance. Good playground for extra curricular activities.

review_content.Placements: More than 50 different companies are coming to the college for placements and the recruitment process. The college did not help to students about this matter and just blamed the students. The institute is a waste.

overview_faqs.question: Is BCE - Bahubali College of Engineering good?
overview_faqs.answer: All in all, Bahubali College of Engineering (BCE) is a reputed college; at least for its engineering discipline. It provides reasonable undergraduate and postgraduate courses, reasonable quality faculty and a reasonable infrastructure. The college is designed for the SSE of the students which stress more on practical training and industry exposure. Records for placements are fairly good today, graduates get into well recognised companies. However, one must take a closer look at particular fields, professors, and individual career objectives to see if BCE answers the expectations and visions.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members of our college are excellent.

content.Placements: Almost 50 students got placed in the 2020 batch. Because of this covid-19, getting placed in top companies is very difficult. Still, our college did very well. Top companies like Tata and Hyundai came to our college. Basically, in starting, they give the role of trainee engineer.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, everything is perfect. The college campus is good. Our college has 3 separate buildings, and the ground is also available. The library is a very peaceful place to read books. In our hostel, free Wi-Fi is provided by hostel management, and the hostel has 4 blocks.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015

The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions, is located in Ernakulum, Kerala. It is an institute approved by AICTE, NCTE, DCI, INC and PCI. Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions provides 60 UG, PG and After 10th courses in 23 specialisations, namely Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Structural Engineering and Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning. Theses programmes are offered in both Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, B.Sc., M.Sc., BCA, B.Com, B.A., B.Pharma, BBA, BDS, After 10th Diploma, M.Com, UG Diploma, M.A., B.Ed, MSW, D.Pharma, D.El.Ed and BSW are some of the courses offered at Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Science, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and Medicine & Health Sciences. The total fee at Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions ranges between INR 54,000 and. Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions has a student intake of for all the courses. Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: My experience at Indira Gandhi Polytechnic College.

review_content.Placements: Placements are decent I completed my diploma during covid pandemic despite that college provides good placements. We have a what'sapp group for placements, all companies details and packages are posted here, interested students call apply. College also guides us in the whole interview process. 80% of students got placed. The average package is 3 LPA. Most students hired by quality departments of the companies. I got role of quality control trainee. First 6 months of job are considered as an internship later based on the performance you got on a role opportunity.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I passed out from my college in 2022. It's a really nice college, "Indira Gandhi Polytechnic College

review_content.Placements: Almost 70-80% of our batch was placed. The highest package for freshers was about 20k, with the lowest and average around 10k. Some of the top recruiting companies are NEST Group and Dewton Company. All of our students got internships through our course at Bosch. Roles offered include Junior Technician, Junior Trainee, and Assistant Engineer in Electrical and Electronics.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our classrooms are good, featuring proper ventilation, smart classrooms, disciplined labs, and a library. The mess and canteen provide friendly food options, and the medical facilities include emergency transportation and first aid. Sports programs are conducted annually, and we have college teams for various sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students get placements offered by a bunch of well-accumulated companies. Every student was working part-time or doing fine with the scholarship allotted by the government and National Service Scheme, which helped a lot of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had excellent campus, faculty members, and an impressive infrastructure that no one could deny, but hostel food was horrible and not worth the money paid. The hostel warden was also not so friendly or well-behaved. That was the only thing we found unsuitable for our good college ambiance.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good facilities.

review_content.Placements: In our college, many students got placed. MDS is the post-graduate degree where a dentist becomes specialised in different areas, such as oral and maxillofacial surgery for cancer in the mouth.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. Double occupancy rooms are spacious. The food in the hostel is not good. The library is open until 5 PM, and you can stay back after class hours.
review_content.Faculty: Our faculty members are good. The semester exams are difficult. Anatomy is a good subject, but it takes a lot of work and dedication to complete the syllabus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good campus life, good faculty and strong placement cell.

review_content.Placements: Our College offers addon courses for students interested in artificial intelligence, machine learning, cloud computing and cyber forensic which are high demanding. Tcs, infosys, and various other companies visits our college for recruitments About 50% of the students got placed in various companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are big enough, neat and clean. We have a big library,2 computer labs with sufficient and efficient computers, and also provided other labs for other department students also. I stay in girls hostel. Food and accommodation is quite good compared to other college hostels. We have a huge mess hall. Staffs for room and bathroom cleaning comes 3 times in a week.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Finance and Taxation - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: Good placements are provided in our college but our college is not worth it for all departments. Our college teaches students how to attend interviews. Students have to find jobs themselves in the science field, teaching, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. There is a good library with various books but the laboratories are average. The food served is average but worth it as it costs Rs.100 per day. Sports and games are good in our college.

admission_process.title: Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions admissionis a blend of merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. The institute considers exam scores for certain courses, while merit achieved in the last qualifying exam is considered to shortlist students for the remaining programmes. Students can pursue a variety of courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels.

Some of the exams accepted by the institute are NEET, ICSE, and ISC, and more. Students must secure a valid score in the relevant exam, and meet the eligibility. Indira Gandhi Group of Institutions fees generally range betweenINR 54,000 - 13,23,760. For more updates regardingIndira Gandhi Group of Institutions coursesand their respective admission criteria, check below:

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Indira Gandhi Polytechnic College, Indira Gandhi Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 4 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My experience at Indira Gandhi Polytechnic College.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. It is located in a silent place full of trees. College is equipped with modern facilities. We have projectors, virtual lab, E-library, etc. Classrooms are big, each lecture is for 45 minutes. We have a hostel and I stayed in the hostel. Food is not good but rooms are spacious and cleaning is done every day. For sports, we have ground but it is empty all the time because no one has time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Indira Gandhi Polytechnic College, Indira Gandhi Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I passed out from my college in 2022. It's a really nice college, "Indira Gandhi Polytechnic College
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our classrooms are good, featuring proper ventilation, smart classrooms, disciplined labs, and a library. The mess and canteen provide friendly food options, and the medical facilities include emergency transportation and first aid. Sports programs are conducted annually, and we have college teams for various sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Our college had excellent campus, faculty members, and an impressive infrastructure that no one could deny, but hostel food was horrible and not worth the money paid. The hostel warden was also not so friendly or well-behaved. That was the only thing we found unsuitable for our good college ambiance.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. Double occupancy rooms are spacious. The food in the hostel is not good. The library is open until 5 PM, and you can stay back after class hours.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life, good faculty and strong placement cell.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are big enough, neat and clean. We have a big library,2 computer labs with sufficient and efficient computers, and also provided other labs for other department students also. I stay in girls hostel. Food and accommodation is quite good compared to other college hostels. We have a huge mess hall. Staffs for room and bathroom cleaning comes 3 times in a week.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. There is a good library with various books but the laboratories are average. The food served is average but worth it as it costs Rs.100 per day. Sports and games are good in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by KMP College of Pharmacy, Indira Gandhi Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 29 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of its teachers, staff members, library facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good in this college. Students have no proper facilities in the laboratory such as reagents, apparatus, etc. So due to this students are facing difficulty, especially during exam times. Equipment is also not working, but they are very accurate about fees, and they inform on time through circular about the fees. Sometimes they even add fines to students for silly reasons. Students have no proper management, if students are reaching them to tell this they would tell that ...

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure with average quality education.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a good infrastructure with a good library with various books. But the laboratories are average in this college. The food served is also average,  but it is too worthy for an amount of Rs 100 per day. The sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Those who came to study can study. Those who came to play can play.
reviews.review_text:
There is an average computer lab, a mechanical lab, an electrical and an electronic lab, all of which are under the care of certain faculty members and crew members. There is Wi-Fi, perfect smart classrooms and a library.
I heard that women's hostel facilities were good and perfect, but in the case of men, they were just meant to be okay. There are different varieties of food cycles, but some days they are not good at all.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest others to be good and get a job to settle.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is good, and it helps in studying purposes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by KMP College of Arts and Science, Indira Gandhi Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 25 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with facility, average placement in 2024, good campus, and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very bad, so we didn't stay in a hostel, but the course is very good. Lab is also good, but some students always argue that it is the only reason most of the students don't leave the hostel. The hostel owner is very bad.

overview_faqs.question: Is Kamala Institute of Technology and Science good?
overview_faqs.answer: Kamala Institute of Technology and Science can be considered a good college. The faculty at KITS are said to be highly qualified and knowledgeable. which contributes to a positive academic environment. The college has good infrastructure. It includes well-equipped laboratories, libraries and sports facilities to enhance the learning experience. Almost 90% of students receive allocations. With the highest salary package reported at INR 12 LPA (lakh per year) and the average package around INR 7.5 LPA, many well-known companies such as Wipro, Infosys and Tech Mahindra often recruit from colleges. Many students also get internships with top companies, which helps them gain practical experience.23 Student satisfaction.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty, placements every year, and the good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 50% of students were placed in our course. 3 LPA was the highest salary package, and the lowest was Rs. 15,000. Top recruiters are Infosys, Accenture, TCP, and Apt Online. 50% of students could secure internships in Infosys, Accenture, and TCP companies with good packages. Many companies like Exchange and Infosys recruit students from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Best college with good Wi-Fi, large, clean classrooms, spacious labs, and a library with unlimited books to clarify our doubts. The best canteen and mess food, medical facilities, and sports games are well played with encouragement from the principal, and we have won many awards.

Around 30 percent of students got internships from our course from Infosys and others. Top roles offered are Deployment, etc.

cut_off.college_name: Kamala Institute of Technology and Science Cutoff 2025: Check TS EAMCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Kamala Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various courses at the UG & PG levels. To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the Kamala Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

Kamala Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 55743 and 126655 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 55743, 55886 and 58718, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Kamala Institute of Technology and Science. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, placements every year, and the good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Best college with good Wi-Fi, large, clean classrooms, spacious labs, and a library with unlimited books to clarify our doubts. The best canteen and mess food, medical facilities, and sports games are well played with encouragement from the principal, and we have won many awards.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, Godhra, Anand Agricultural University Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, Godhra, Anand Agricultural University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, Godhra, Anand Agricultural University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode.

faqs.answer: A:    College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, Godhra, Anand Agricultural University provides programmes including M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech in streams such as Engineering, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Agriculture & Farm Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, Godhra, Anand Agricultural University offer?

review_content.Placements: About 90 per cent of students get placed an average of 300000 per annum having the highest of 372000 in session 2023. Top recruiting companies are Netafim and Agrovikas. There is a mandatory internship of each student who enrolled in courses due to its 19 credits. Most of roles offered are in marketing and sales.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is well-equipped with wifi, an AC classroom, a library and well-equipped field and off-field labs. The hostel has a capacity of 2 as well as 3 student capacity rooms and there is solar power electricity in the hostel. Food in the mess is hygienic and controlled and maintained by the student committee.

college_info.college_name: BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani):

faqs.answer: A:    BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani) has been rated 3.4 on placements.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani)?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani) offers a wide range of programmes at UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Law. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, B.A. LL.B. and LL.B. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani) fee structure ranges between INR 48,000 to 2,25,824.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani) are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE, BCI. The combined seats available for courses offered at BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani) goes up to 684.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani)?

review_content.General: I'm from the 2010-2014 batch, and there were 150 students in the mechanical branch. None of the students was placed from the campus. Even our seniors were not placed. None of the companies visited our campus for placements. Indian army visited our campus for recruitment. Even after that, the placement record of the campus was 0%. There is no placement cell. We have to get industrial training opportunities on our own. They don't even conduct any industry visits.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are of good quality. But there is no Wi-Fi facility available in computer labs. We can't even use computers in our spare time. The library is nice, and we can get all the books related to our study there. However, we can't borrow more than 3 books from the library. There is a peaceful atmosphere in the library to study. Medical facilities are provided here.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: You have to realize that the monetary value of whatever money you spend in BITS for your education is extremely less than what you stand to gain in the 4-5 years. Yes, of course not everyone becomes successful but even lesser are given an opportunity to become successful. You are ready to spend 10-15 lacs easily on higher education in the U.S.A for a duration of 2 year course but spending 7-8 lacs for a 4 year course and that too much more valuable in your life seems a little too high. I think we are being unfair here. BITS want to become a world class university, that's their vision. But you don't want them to charge even half of the fee that a world class institution charges. That's hypocrisy. Then let's not say we don't have any institute like Harvard, MIT, Stanford and Yale. Yes they are not there right now but they are trying. I support it. I wouldn't have if it would have the case 7 years back. Because I wasn't mature then. Money was a huge deal. Still is. But the reason we earn is clear now to grow. And BITS is a place you grow. Oh, the only disadvantage of being in BITS is that you are used to working with such smart and funny people that it might get a little difficult adjusting in professional world :)

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2011
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The college is good, with a nice campus and with all equipped facility, we got a great computer lab and library which is now upgraded to digital one, but you may require to face a entrance exam which is not a difficult task if you are through with your basic subjects, except this you will love the hostel and canteen here. review_summary.college_name: BITS Group of Institutions (BITS Bhiwani) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is one of the best colleges in India. I recommend others to take admission to this college.

content.Placements: About 20% of students were placed from our course. The salary package offered was 1 LPA. About 80% of students got internships from our course. I have taken admission in B.Tech in computer science and engineering because I think it is the future demand of the private sector in the country.
content.Infrastructure: There are completely air-conditioned classrooms here. All the qualities of the hostel are fabulous. There are all the facilities like a canteen, games, sports, etc. Curricular activities are also available in this college. They really inspire students in every way. I really love this.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: If you want a good future, please don't take admission in BITS.

content.Placements: I'm from the 2010-2014 batch, and there were 150 students in the mechanical branch. None of the students was placed from the campus. Even our seniors were not placed. None of the companies visited our campus for placements. Indian army visited our campus for recruitment. Even after that, the placement record of the campus was 0%. There is no placement cell. We have to get industrial training opportunities on our own. They don't even conduct any industry visits.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are of good quality. But there is no Wi-Fi facility available in computer labs. We can't even use computers in our spare time. The library is nice, and we can get all the books related to our study there. However, we can't borrow more than 3 books from the library. There is a peaceful atmosphere in the library to study. Medical facilities are provided here.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016

content.Other: You have to realize that the monetary value of whatever money you spend in BITS for your education is extremely less than what you stand to gain in the 4-5 years. Yes, of course not everyone becomes successful but even lesser are given an opportunity to become successful. You are ready to spend 10-15 lacs easily on higher education in the U.S.A for a duration of 2 year course but spending 7-8 lacs for a 4 year course and that too much more valuable in your life seems a little too high. I think we are being unfair here. BITS want to become a world class university, that's their vision. But you don't want them to charge even half of the fee that a world class institution charges. That's hypocrisy. Then let's not say we don't have any institute like Harvard, MIT, Stanford and Yale. Yes they are not there right now but they are trying. I support it. I wouldn't have if it would have the case 7 years back. Because I wasn't mature then. Money was a huge deal. Still is. But the reason we earn is clear now to grow. And BITS is a place you grow. Oh, the only disadvantage of being in BITS is that you are used to working with such smart and funny people that it might get a little difficult adjusting in professional world :)

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2011

content.Other: The college is good, with a nice campus and with all equipped facility, we got a great computer lab and library which is now upgraded to digital one, but you may require to face a entrance exam which is not a difficult task if you are through with your basic subjects, except this you will love the hostel and canteen here. Its nice college over all you can count it for other courses also and maybe you find foreigners and NRI too.

highlights.summary: The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for K.S.K College of Engineering and Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college faculty members are good.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 90% of students are placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Tata Motors, Eicher, TCS, CTS, Ford, Hyundai, EcosPort, Leyland, etc., visit our campus. Our college offers B.E., B. Tech., civil, mechanical, EEE, and biomedical.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. We have libraries, an auditorium, a ground, cricket, basketball, football, tennis, and a computer lab. The hostel is very good. The food and snacks are good. The college and canteen are good. Extracurricular activities are available at our college. All labs are available in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This college is worth the money with good facilities and good education.

review_content.Placements: There are about 80% of students who got placed. The highest package is 1 LPA and the lowest package is 0.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, HP, ZOHO, and so on. They got about 70% internship in TCS. The top roles are a senior software engineer and game developer. There are so many roles available if you take this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are fully functional labs with Wi-Fi. The classroom is well with good infrastructure and a library with about 2500 books. The hostel is good and maintained well. The quality of food available in the canteen is good, but it's good for the cost. The medical facilities are available with separate rooms. Sports events are conducted on the odd semester. The campus has a volleyball court, cricket field, and so on. Some sports events are separate for boys and girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2022.

review_content.Placements: 90%of students has placed in my course. The average packege of the placement was 15000-20000. There are lots of companies are recruiting in our college categories like manufacturing industries. Too many students gets an internships over many companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure was good. Then the food taste was average. Labs and classroom facilities are good enough for us. College buses available for the surrounding. Mess was active 16 hours a day. Highly secured hostel here. For boys and girls.

faqs.answer: K.S.K College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: K. S. K College of Engineering and Technology is absolutely the best college.

content.Placements: K. S. K. College of Engineering and Technology is one of the great engineering colleges. This college conducts more campus interviews every year.7th and 8th semester students are eligible for these campus interviews. Students salary packages are INR 3–8 LPA. Yamaha, TVS, Bajaj, TCS, and Infosys companies visited this college for campus interviews.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides free Wi-Fi network facilities on the campus. More computer and mechanical laboratory facilities are here at this college. This college library facility was excellent. Separate hostel facilities are available for boys and girls. Hostel food tastes good. Medical facilities are also here at this college. A variety of foods are available in this college canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college faculty members are good.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 90% of students are placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Tata Motors, Eicher, TCS, CTS, Ford, Hyundai, EcosPort, Leyland, etc., visit our campus. Our college offers B.E., B. Tech., civil, mechanical, EEE, and biomedical.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. We have libraries, an auditorium, a ground, cricket, basketball, football, tennis, and a computer lab. The hostel is very good. The food and snacks are good. The college and canteen are good. Extracurricular activities are available at our college. All labs are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This college is worth the money with good facilities and good education.

content.Placements: There are about 80% of students who got placed. The highest package is 1 LPA and the lowest package is 0.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, HP, ZOHO, and so on. They got about 70% internship in TCS. The top roles are a senior software engineer and game developer. There are so many roles available if you take this course.
content.Infrastructure: There are fully functional labs with Wi-Fi. The classroom is well with good infrastructure and a library with about 2500 books. The hostel is good and maintained well. The quality of food available in the canteen is good, but it's good for the cost. The medical facilities are available with separate rooms. Sports events are conducted on the odd semester. The campus has a volleyball court, cricket field, and so on. Some sports events are separate for boys and girls.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2022.

content.Placements: 90%of students has placed in my course. The average packege of the placement was 15000-20000. There are lots of companies are recruiting in our college categories like manufacturing industries. Too many students gets an internships over many companies.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure was good. Then the food taste was average. Labs and classroom facilities are good enough for us. College buses available for the surrounding. Mess was active 16 hours a day. Highly secured hostel here. For boys and girls.

Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.

highlights.summary: The application portal for CG PET 2026 is now live for admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Mar 27, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 14, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Science and Food Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: We have the lowest fees, excellent placements, and faculty members for B. Tech.

review_content.Placements: Our college gives 100% of students jobs in dairy plants all over India. Hence, as it is not a technical course, its salary is comparatively lower, which only depends on your working department. If you get into the management department, then you can get Rs.100000 per month. So, it only depends on your hard work. There is huge scope for high-salary jobs in state dairy cooperatives, and private food and dairy companies all over the world. If you don't want a job, you can become a professor after PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: I greatly thank ICAR, which provides funds for all the modern facilities necessary at the hostel, such as a modern mess, a 64-inch Sony TV, and Wi-Fi everywhere in the college. There are newspapers in Hindi and English with all sports news. Besides these, there is a modern library, well-equipped labs with automated machines worth lacs, a dairy plant, a cafeteria, a music room, an auditorium, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Science and Food Technology - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent infrastructure & facilities.

review_content.Placements: Average of 3 LPA was given by top companies, i.e. Amul, Hatsun agro, Vadilal, Sarda group, IB group. Mostly students on their 8th semester undergo In-plant Training and got placed based on their performance.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well developed infrastructure with practical lab of every department, Wi-Fi throughout the campus, Smart e-classrooms, gigantic auditorium, Outdoor gym, proper parking facilities, garden and a playground, in-campus Boys & Girls hostel.
review_content.Faculty: Dairy technology is no new course across the country. Since white revolution, our country has come up and ranked No. 1 in milk production around the globe. You will learn hygiene milk production, handling, processing, manufacturing of milk products, quality testing, their shelf-life study, packaging and dispatch. Half of the course will deal with Technological, engineering, chemical & microbiological aspect processing milk & manufacturing milk products along with extension education, management & accounting. In the complete third year, you will learn the same with food products. The course also promote entrepreneurship development & industrial training.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Nice college with good placement and affordable to every student.

content.Placements: The scenario of the placements is mixed, if you have good skills and a good CGPA, then you will have a nice placement. The maximum placement in 2020 was 5 LPA and the minimum was 6 LPA. For core branches like CSE, mechanical, electrical, and civil, there are more placements than for IT branches, but it's satisfactory and good as well. Top recruiters for the placements are Nvidia, L&T, Kirloskar, E&H, Tata Technologies, consultancy firms, and Wipro. There are lots of internship companies like Principal, Q Spider, Suzlon, Motors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are sufficient to grow in our college. Classrooms are nice, with Wi-Fi and projectors available for learning, and they are big with good benches and stuff. Library and labs are very nice as they have a good amount of equipment and also nice infrastructure. Hostel is not sufficient for boys. For them, it has all facilities available, but in the boys' hostel, and girls' hostel, there are limited facilities with limited seats, and you need merit for it. Canteen is small but nice as well as mess in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and affordable engineering college.

content.Placements: 50-60% of students were placed. The highest package offered was 12 LPA, and the average package was 3-4 LPA. Many different small companies visited the college campus for placement drives like Acedemor, Eco Space, MSME Mitra, BARC, and pool campus drive available by the university. There is a compulsory internship for students in the 6th semester.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained, and Wi-Fi is also available. Classes are good and maintained. Fully equipped labs are available. The library has all kinds of books, and a digital library is also accessible. Mess food is okay and affordable.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Engineering College.

content.Placements: Only 25 students got placed, and their packages are not more than 3 LPA or less. The lowest package was 1.8 LPA, and the top package was 10 LPA for the civil branch. faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IET Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the IET Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good with the lush green campus. Hostel for boys and girls are good and efficient.

review_content.Placements: There no placements for the architecture department. However, they provide internship in many architectural firms. Mostly 50% of students got internships from our college. The highest stipend offered was Rs. 12,000. The lowest stipend offered was Rs. 5,000. There is a placement cell, but for the architecture department.
review_content.Infrastructure: Medical facilities are available here in very well-conditions. The campus and also hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi facility. Labs are very good. Studios and classrooms are very good in conditions. The college provides the best sports and games facilities. All the studios are in good working conditions. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Average college with a nice fee structure .

content.Placements: Very low placement percentage with very low packages. Local recruiting companies with very low packages. You must do everything on your own because the syllabus at every college is very outdated. So you should do a side hustle or do something that you need to do .
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very nice with 4 Wi-Fi in each hostel, and the authority takes good care of the hostel if you need any kind of help like an ambulance, cleanliness, water, electricity, or gym-related. You will be provided with it if it's genuine. If your tubelight breaks down or the fan stops working, it will be corrected within 2-3 hours .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for the civil engineering course.

content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed, and every year a lot of students gets placed according to their skills and percentage. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Nagarjun GP and Hero GP visit our campus for placements. About 50% of the students from our course got an internship. Top roles like site manager and HR are offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good Wi-Fi facility. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides a spacious library and classrooms. Quality of the hostel and the food served in the mess is good. Sports and games are also well-managed. Warden and dean are very helpful with great nature.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good with the lush green campus. Hostel for boys and girls are good and efficient.

content.Placements: There no placements for the architecture department. However, they provide internship in many architectural firms. Mostly 50% of students got internships from our college. The highest stipend offered was Rs. 12,000. The lowest stipend offered was Rs. 5,000. There is a placement cell, but for the architecture department.
content.Infrastructure: Medical facilities are available here in very well-conditions. The campus and also hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi facility. Labs are very good. Studios and classrooms are very good in conditions. The college provides the best sports and games facilities. All the studios are in good working conditions. Hostels are lucrative, and the food served in the hostel is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: The fee structure of our college is comparatively low.

content.Placements: There is no scope for on-campus placements for electrical engineering students. The college invites companies related to the marketing field, and not core companies in which a candidate can start their career and rely on it. The placement cell is of no use when it doesn't have contacts with reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus has a lot of greenery and is located away from busy roads and pollution. The campus has enough green parks and cafeterias for students to hang out. Enough number of blocks are available for all the streams. Labs are well-equipped with the latest technology.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Poor management, do not play with the future of india.

content.Placements: Zero Placements for the architecture course in this college. And Rest of the B.Tech course are comparatively better than B.Arch. As per my knowledge in the past 8 years, no placements had been done in B.Arch course. Only the M. B.A. Students got good placements every year.
content.Infrastructure: It is a very nice campus full of greenery and building structures. Hostels and campus buildings are wi-fi active. Punjab is highly heated in summers and None of the classrooms have AC facility. Quality of food in mess is average and quality of food in canteen is a evil from the very beginning. The nearby area is so undeveloped.
