hostel_campus.college_name: IET Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Average college with a nice fee structure .
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very nice with 4 Wi-Fi in each hostel, and the authority takes good care of the hostel if you need any kind of help like an ambulance, cleanliness, water, electricity, or gym-related. You will be provided with it if it's genuine. If your tubelight breaks down or the fan stops working, it will be corrected within 2-3 hours .

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the civil engineering course.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good Wi-Fi facility. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides a spacious library and classrooms. Quality of the hostel and the food served in the mess is good. Sports and games are also well-managed. Warden and dean are very helpful with great nature.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good with the lush green campus. Hostel for boys and girls are good and efficient.
reviews.review_text: Medical facilities are available here in very well-conditions. The campus and also hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi facility. Labs are very good. Studios and classrooms are very good in conditions. The college provides the best sports and games facilities. All the studios are in good working conditions. Hostels are lucrative, and the food served in the hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The fee structure of our college is comparatively low.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus has a lot of greenery and is located away from busy roads and pollution. The campus has enough green parks and cafeterias for students to hang out. Enough number of blocks are available for all the streams. Labs are well-equipped with the latest technology.

reviews.review_heading: Poor management, do not play with the future of india.
reviews.review_text: It is a very nice campus full of greenery and building structures. Hostels and campus buildings are wi-fi active. Punjab is highly heated in summers and None of the classrooms have AC facility. Quality of food in mess is average and quality of food in canteen is a evil from the very beginning. The nearby area is so undeveloped.

reviews.review_heading: Average in case of infrastructure. Poor in case of placements. Hostel life is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is fine. I would rate it 3 out of 5. Cafeteria is not good and transportation facilities are not very good. Sports and games is good. Hostel rooms are 3 out of 5. The food there is not of good quality in hostel mess. Also, the food in cafeteria is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to make your dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: There is no doubt about the infrastructure of this college. Apart from being away from the main road, there are no other cons about its reachability and the infrastructure. The classrooms and the labs are in the A grade condition. They are managing well. All the college is covered with the greenery.

reviews.review_heading: All in all, this campus is fabulous.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good and is developing at a very fast rate.Here the main is the location of the campus as compare to the other colleges.This place is quite and students enjoy studying here.Different types of sports activities are also done here.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because the faculty are supportive, and average student are capable of getting placed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite nice, and the staff are employed to take care of the same and do their job well. The rooms are properly ventilated and well lit. Annually, many sports events are held such as badminton etc. The canteen provides delicious food. I usually eat at the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college will be good if it will be handed to good people, otherwise, fate is clear.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi and all the facilities. The infrastructure is the most unused thing in the campus. The Wi-Fi is available on the campus and a lifeline to the student living on the isolated island. For the namesake, everything is available on the campus, the canteen, two Nescafe, and dispensary, gym and even playrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the placement drive.
reviews.review_text:
It is spread over 60 acres of land.
Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games are good but the canteen is not up to the mark.
The quality of the lab is good, especially for the electrical and the mechanical branches.
Good quality of food is available in the canteen. 
The rooms of the hostel are good with proper hygiene and cleaning.
The bathrooms are also cleaned on a daily basis.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but weak placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The full campus is Wi-Fi enabled. All the classrooms are well-equipped with all required facilities. The hostels are in a very good condition. Various canteens are available on the campus with good quality food and affordable price rates. A well-equipped gym is available for both girls' and boys' hostels.

reviews.review_heading: A good institute overall.
reviews.review_text:
The institute is equipped with world class laboratories and apparatus. The facilities offered by the department are: 
The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, a big sports ground, indoor and outdoor, modern classrooms, a cafeteria for quality food and snacks.
The hostel mess also provides good food according to the menu decided by the student committee.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect destination for the upcoming engineers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well- planned and the whole of the campus including the hostel is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed data. The labs are fully established and all the equipment are in a good condition. A large cafeteria and a canteen is there where students can get quality food and snacks.

College is located in the village of Roopnagar called Bhaddal. It is 8 km from the National Highway. The campus is fully residential with the option of day boarding. College runs various buses connecting Chandigarh, Ropar, Nagal with the college. The hostel rooms are very spacious and big. The college has very excellent sports facilities football and cricket especially. As far as teaching is concerned the faculty might have changed but overall it is strict and competent. faqs.answer: Government College Of Engineering, Bodinayakkanur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Do check out this review about Government Engineering College, Then.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities for the civil department are always good. The highest salary package offered is around 2.5 to 3.5 LPA. All the students from my batch in my department got internship opportunities this year. Top recruiting companies are L&T and Tata Projects Limited. The placement opportunities in other departments are average, especially for the Computer Science and ECE departments.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a well-maintained campus. The infrastructure is good, and there is Wi-Fi available inside the college campus. The food in the hostel is acceptable but not excellent. Good laboratory facilities are available in all the departments. The hostel infrastructure is good. The mess and the canteen provide good food. There is minimal importance given to sports and other co-curricular activities.

individual_reviews.title: Our college has good environment and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 7.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and also good startups. The top roles offered are front-end, software engineer, project engineer trainee, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Laboratory, classrooms, and library are better. The laboratory has many components. The food served in the hostel is average. Hostel environment is good but it is located outside the campus. campus. Sports are also conducted.

There are no laboratory facilities for the CSE department. Girls' hostel is available on campus. The boys' hostel is outside the campus and they have to travel 1050 meters.

hostel_campus.college_name: Government College Of Engineering Bodinayakkanur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Do check out this review about Government Engineering College, Then.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-maintained campus. The infrastructure is good, and there is Wi-Fi available inside the college campus. The food in the hostel is acceptable but not excellent. Good laboratory facilities are available in all the departments. The hostel infrastructure is good. The mess and the canteen provide good food. There is minimal importance given to sports and other co-curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Laboratory, classrooms, and library are better. The laboratory has many components. The food served in the hostel is average. Hostel environment is good but it is located outside the campus. campus. Sports are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College Of Engineering, Bodinayakkanur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Our campus is surrounded by mountains. There is a gym facility in the hostel. A playground is not available for sports. There are no laboratory facilities for the CSE department. Girls' hostel is available on campus. The boys' hostel is outside the campus and they have to travel 1050 meters.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, Laboratory, classrooms, Systems, Seminar hall, Smart class, Auditorium, above all the facilities and infrastructure available in our course and department. The food is of average quality and good medical facilities and Cricket and volleyball games are available in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has improved placements and is taking smart classes.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Labs are new and well-equipped. There are smart classes and a library. There are well-furnished and ventilated classrooms in a single building. Hostels are average-looking with regular bathrooms and toilets. The food served in the hostel mess is average. Any sport can be played within the hostel premises like volleyball, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College Of Engineering, Bodinayakkanur.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities are sufficient. The latest equipments are used in laboratories to make students knowledgeable.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers were calm and cool.
reviews.review_text: One or two staff are very interesting in our course. My college hostel was outside the campus. Hostel students had to walk 4 to 5 kilometres daily to attend college. At lunchtime, we had to walk the same distance and there is no streetlight.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers were helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi, labs, classrooms and library all are very good facilities and infrastructure compared to other colleges. Good hostel and quality of food and materials are good, according to my opinion. First aid kit is available for any small accident wounds. Sports and games are developing now only.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped labs available in the ECE department. The Wi-Fi is available for study purposes. Both the library and the audio library are available inside the campus. Classrooms are spacious and comfortable. Overall, the basic infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied because of college teaching, placements,staffs motivation and especially free to study
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are advance lab facilities, Wi-Fi facilities, smart classes conducted in led display, space free classrooms, well designed library etc. Quality of hostel is average because of it's security ie. Hostel is 1 km distance from college and no ground and sports facilities but all playing equipments are available at good condition
Decent Quality of good nin mess and there is no canteen, no medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories are well-advanced with Wi-Fi connectivity. Many workshops are available for mechanical, civil, thermal, electrical and electronic, and fluid laboratories. The staff conducts laboratory experiments three times a week.

reviews.review_heading: Review about Government College Of Engineering, Bodinayakkanur.
reviews.review_text: As the college is maintained by the government, it has a decent infrastructure and good laboratory facilities. Wi-fi is available inside the college and it has a well-stocked library with a decent number of books. Hostel food is poor, and the accommodation facility is average. Mess and canteen infrastructure is average. Sports and indoor stadium facilities are available and are well maintained by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus has greenery all around.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is well-maintained. All laboratories are available. Classrooms are spacious. Library facility is available 24X7. Girls' hostel is available on our campus. Canteen is not available in this college. Sports are not conducted in this college. The food served in the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite old. It needs to renew. They can make food a little tastier. They can introduce a new menu so that students don't get bored. They can make a few changes to the menu and add some snacks to it.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the staff in the last semester.
reviews.review_text: Labs, Classrooms, Library are available. There is no Wi-Fi connection in department. Hostel are in good condition but the food quality was average, medical facilities are available, sports like volleyball, basketball, Cricket, athletics are available here and games like chess alone is available.
